LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JIMMEY PARRISH'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2015, PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AND ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Deputy City Attorney, Jonathan Yank of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415.554.3816) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The matter is not opposed and the Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and SALINA MICKELS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
